name: AFTER FLY
headline: AFTER FLY organizer profile
description: AFTER FLY is an Indore organizer candidate discovered through public event evidence. The current draft should remain website-only until an admin reviews identity, surfaces, cadence, and owner-safe copy.

fitNotes: This profile was promoted from organizer intake after manual admin review.

name: Sunday Table Club
headline: Sunday Table Club in New York
description: Small hosted dinners and mixers with prompts that keep the room moving.
sourceSummary: Sunday Table Club is a first-party Catch demo club with app-created events, verified event reviews, host identity, and event-success metrics.

catchEvents.title: Hosted long-table dinner
catchEvents.summary: A hosted long-table dinner with arrivals, prompts, and a warm close.

catchEvents.title: Hosted singles mixer
catchEvents.summary: A hosted mixer with live rotations, compatibility questions, and host-facing reveal controls.

catchEvents.title: Hosted singles mixer
catchEvents.summary: A completed hosted mixer with enough feedback and matches for the sales report.

reviews.comment: The host kept the dinner moving without making it feel forced. Easy arrivals, good prompts, and useful follow-up after.
The rotations made it simple to meet more people than I would have on my own, and the post-event catch window felt private.
Good crowd and clear structure. I liked that the host could adjust the live flow when the group changed.

fitNotes: App-created clubs should lead with host identity, upcoming events, ratings, and member activity rather than a source ledger.
Verified review aggregates matter more here than scrape confidence because the club and events already exist inside Catch.
The page should help members decide whether to follow, book, or review, while unclaimed scraped pages should focus on owner claim.

sources.label: Catch host-demo scenario
sources.detail: First-party synthetic club used for host workflow, roster, review, payment, and Playbook QA.
